title: Monday Music Mix #13
summary: I’m getting a bit lethargic after long weekends, which is why these mixes are getting posted this late. However there’s a silver lining - with this laziness, I do get to sample some excellent music - and this week’s mix is as eclectic as it gets. Some very interesting styles being covered in this one.

However there’s a silver lining - with this laziness, I do get to sample some excellent music - and this week’s mix is as eclectic as it gets. Some very interesting styles being covered in this one.

tracks.title: I’m Losing Myself (Feat. Ed Droste)
tracks.displayText: Robin Pecknold - I’m Losing Myself (Feat. Ed Droste)

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Thirteenth

I’m getting a bit lethargic after long weekends, which is why these mixes are getting posted this late. However there’s a silver lining - with this laziness, I do get to sample some excellent music - and this week’s mix is as eclectic as it gets. Some very interesting styles being covered in this one. 

As always, suggestions, comments and ideas are always welcome. 

Monday Music Mix: 13

Tracklist:

  1. Seekae - Gnor
  2. Sandra Kolstad - The Devil
  3. Ikea Satan - The Wait
  4. Zebra Tracks - Isabelle Creeps
  5. Young Michelin - Les Copains
  6. Aluna George - Disobey
  7. Robin Pecknold - I’m Losing Myself (Feat. Ed Droste)

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album (zip format) 

Listen to Grooveshark playlist 

Like what you heard? Send some love through the comments section, if you please.
legacy.favoriteTrackCue: * Tracks in blue indicate my favourites
